creator: asmodai@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please, 

learn how to use the installtion utility first: 

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/install.html 

The debug screen is at ALT-F2. 
Something happened which caused mysql not to install correctly. 
You can reinstall it after installing FreeBSD without problems. 

Also, it is better to ask this sort of question on the freebsd-questions 
mailinglist.
